title: Add -params mode to force undef parameters in selected cells.
body: This enables synthesis output to tools that require that all parameter values have a particular value, but is more generic than something like https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blame/master/techlibs/anlogic/anlogic_determine_init.cc#L26.  I was considering adding a parameters filter, but I'm not convinced it is required beyond the existing "select" mechanism.
